final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand color + typography system showcase for "染秋 (RAN QIU)", an autumn fragrance brand rooted in Eastern philosophy.

Style/medium: needs a sophisticated brand identity aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include color swatch panels for primary and secondary colors, typography specimens for brand fonts
Subject: must include the brand name "染秋 (RAN QIU)" as the focal identity
Scene/backdrop: needs a clean, minimal presentation context — exact layout structure is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, contemplative autumn atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: must include warm autumn tones inspired by osmanthus, persimmon, maple leaves, and oolong tea
Materials/textures: needs an elegant, refined surface treatment — exact paper/texture finish is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋 (RAN QIU)"
Constraints: must present primary color swatch, secondary color swatch, and typography specimens in a cohesive brand system layout
Avoid: must avoid generic stock imagery, must avoid Western-centric autumn cliches
